theme_strategy: Dark mode default, system preference following, light mode toggle. Client-side storage (localStorage) only. No backend.
aesthetic_archetype: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Authority, Clarity, Truth) mixed with Linear-style technical precision.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' approach. Extreme clarity with premium character.
rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Space Grotesk.
All financial figures MUST use JetBrains Mono to ensure tabular lining of numbers.
Use extremely tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.04em) on headings.
Labels and overlines must be uppercase with wide tracking (0.2em).
Strict monochrome foundation. Color is used ONLY for financial status (positive, negative, upcoming, warning).
NO muddy or grey transparent overlays.
Backgrounds must be solid. Use a subtle noise/grain texture on the body (opacity 2-3%) for a premium tactile feel.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: High Density Grid for the dashboard but extremely generous internal padding for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned content. Asymmetry creates visual interest. Right-align monetary amounts in lists.

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm transition-all duration-300
cards.hero_budget: Relative positioning, noise texture overlay, massive JetBrains Mono typography for the balance, no heavy gradients.
cards.flexible_spending: Includes a sharp, 4px height progress bar. Color logic: under 80% = semantic.flexible_safe, 80-99% = semantic.warning_upcoming, 100%+ = semantic.expense_negative.

buttons.primary: bg-text_primary text-background rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-border rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:border-text_primary focus:ring-0 transition-colors duration-200 text-lg
inputs.rule: Use elegant underline inputs for manual entry forms rather than standard boxed inputs.

surfaces.dropdowns_modals: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150
surfaces.rule: CRITICAL: Never use a completely transparent background for dropdowns or floating elements. Always use solid or heavily blurred backgrounds.

charts.donut: Use Recharts PieChart. Thin strokes, no generic distinct colors. Use the monochrome chart_palette. Center text shows total expense.
charts.bar_trend: Use Recharts BarChart. Minimal axes, hide grid lines or use very subtle border color. Active bar gets primary text color, inactive bars get muted color.

motion.strategy: Linear-inspired micro-interactions. Instant responsiveness, smooth but quick transitions.
motion.hover_states: All interactable elements must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:text-white). Do not rely on transition: all.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets (framer-motion, y: 20, opacity: 0, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.05).
motion.mark_as_paid: When an item is marked as paid, animate it sliding out right and collapsing height before moving to history.

rules: NO EMOJIS anywhere in the UI.
Icons should use stroke-width 1.5 for a refined, sharp look.
Use icons sparingly, primarily for Savings Envelopes, Categories, and Navigation.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='budget-total-balance', data-testid='mark-paid-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize data privacy: Implement robust localStorage logic with initial state hydration. No external API calls for data.

Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (via Fontshare or local face if unavailable, fallback to Space Grotesk IS BANNED, fallback to General Sans or default sans), Manrope, JetBrains Mono.
Currency formatting MUST use Intl.NumberFormat for INR (₹). Example: ₹37,000.
Implement Shadcn UI heavily customized to remove the 'Vercel look'. Override radiuses, shadows, and borders to match the design system.
For the Reminder System, leverage browser Notification API alongside in-app toast notifications (use Sonner).
Ensure the layout is highly responsive. The Grid should degrade gracefully to 1 column on mobile.
Avoid unnecessary wrappers. Grid children must be direct children to maintain layout structure.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop'.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center-align the app container. Maintain natural left-aligned reading flow.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, explicit color shifts.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Add data-testid to every button, input, list item, and key text element.
Do not use transparent dropdown backgrounds.
